title: PM Baseline Field Authority Promotion
objective: Author the smallest bounded authority update needed to promote `baseline_start_at` and `baseline_end_at` for Task and WorkPackage from deferred to implementation-ready, define what baseline truth means in the PM domain, and explicitly preserve the prohibition on synthetic client-side baseline fabrication until a persisted baseline lane exists.
constrained_outputs: One bounded authority memo under c:/APEX Platform/Platform-Authority defining baseline truth semantics for Task and WorkPackage
Explicit promotion of `baseline_start_at` and `baseline_end_at` from deferred to implementation-ready with clear proceed-without language for runtime consumers until persistence lands
No SQL, no loader changes, no bridge changes, and no UI changes
validation_steps: Confirm packet 020a is authority-only and does not author SQL, loader logic, bridge routes, or UI code
Confirm the baseline fields are promoted only with explicit PM-domain semantics and without inventing synthetic baseline truth
Confirm the packet leaves persisted baseline landing and import mapping to later bounded packets
sql_permission_note: Packet 020a is authority-only. No SQL, migration edits, bridge changes, loader changes, or UI implementation are authorized.
